pages.text: Sam and Dara were at the park. A shiny sparkle caught Sam’s eye.

blocks.text: Sam and Dara were at the park. A shiny sparkle caught Sam’s eye.

pages.text: A crystal ball! A magic pearl! A treasure for Sam’s collection!

blocks.text: A crystal ball! A magic pearl! A treasure for Sam’s collection!

pages.text: “That’s not treasure – that’s junk,” said Dara. She didn’t like the things Sam found.

blocks.text: “That’s not treasure – that’s junk,” said Dara.
She didn’t like the things Sam found.

pages.text: That was fine with Sam. “Time to go treasure hunting!” Off he went with his backpack.

blocks.text: That was fine with Sam. “Time to go treasure hunting!”
Off he went with his backpack.

pages.text: Between the bushes Sam found a crown and a magic wand.

blocks.text: Between the bushes Sam found a crown and a magic wand.

pages.text: Under an old log he found monsters and creepy creatures. No thank you!

blocks.text: Under an old log he found monsters and creepy creatures. No thank you!

pages.text: Among the flowers Sam found a chest and a ring.

blocks.text: Among the flowers Sam found a chest and a ring.

pages.text: In the stream Sam found a message in a bottle and a wise old wizard.

blocks.text: In the stream Sam found a message in a bottle and a wise old wizard.

pages.text: By the lamp post Sam found a sports car and a victory trophy. Time to show Dara all the treasures he had found!

blocks.text: By the lamp post Sam found a sports car and a victory trophy. Time to show Dara all the treasures he had found!

pages.text: Dara was crying. “I lost my ring,” said Dara. “I don’t know where I dropped it.”

blocks.text: Dara was crying. “I lost my ring,” said Dara. “I don’t know where I dropped it.”

pages.text: That sounded like something Sam had found. It was! It was Dara’s ring!

blocks.text: That sounded like something Sam had found.
It was! It was Dara’s ring!

pages.text: “Thank you, Sam! You DO find treasures!”

blocks.text: “Thank you, Sam! You DO find treasures!”
